svg.text: Rebuilt on strict square-pixel canvases. Mascot body uses an 8x8 grid; working spark uses a separate 4x4 grid with the same 8x8 cells.

g.text: Most like your reference. Low silhouette, tiny ear bumps, safe default.
Roundest silhouette. Best candidate for the tiniest notch and menu sizes.
A touch more character. Slightly taller legs, still locked to the same grid.
